data:
create table itemschecklisttestcasemodel
(
    id           uuid default gen_random_uuid() not null,
    item_id uuid
        constraint item__id
            references itemsmodel,
    checklist_id uuid
        constraint items_checklist_id
            references checklistmodel,
    testcase_id  uuid
        constraint items_testcase_id
            references testcasesmodel
);
